changelog: FIX (no audio on Blue Ruin / DTS movies) — Telemetry caught it: audio track is audio/vnd.dts which Android (including NVIDIA SHIELD) has no native decoder for due to licensing. Added the Jellyfin-prebuilt Media3 FFmpeg audio decoder extension which provides software DTS, DTS-HD, AC3, EAC3, TrueHD, FLAC, Opus, Vorbis, ALAC, G711, AMR decoding. Same package + class names as Google's official extension so DefaultRenderersFactory.EXTENSION_RENDERER_MODE_ON picks it up via reflection — zero code changes beyond the gradle dep. APK grows ~6 MB (native libs for arm64/armv7/x86/x86_64).
Mandatory:true so v1.44.36 devices upgrade automatically and get DTS audio.
